choose-three.transcript: Choose any three story stones. Every group has its own story.

stones-ready.transcript: Your three stones are ready. Tap the arrow to begin.

another-story.transcript: Choose three new stones for another story.

story-dragon--orange-cat--white-cat-begi.transcript: An Amber Acorn Village, friendly dragon skipped across the mossy green wishing for one thing, friends to share a picnic on the soft grass.

story-dragon--orange-cat--white-cat-comp.transcript: Orange cat padded over with a picnic basket, but a gust tumbled all the acorn muffins rolling down the winding bumpy path.

story-dragon--orange-cat--white-cat-reso.transcript: White cat pounced in and together friendly dragon puffed warm air. Orange cat scooped, white cat caught and they munched every muffin giggling.

story-dragon--friendly-monster--orange-c.transcript: In Bluebell Acorn Village, friendly dragon warmed the Acorn Roof cottages with a puff of cozy breath. Today, he beamed, let's have a picnic on the green.
Orange cat trotted up with a basket of muffins. Oh no, she mured. The green is bare and bumpy. No air soft to sit.
Friendly monster bounded over with armfuls of mossy blankets, dragon smooth them, cat set out muffins, and all three cheered on the softest greenest picnic ever.

story-dragon--orange-cat--owl-beginning.transcript: In Bubble Acorn Village, friendly dragons skipped along the mossy paths, wishing for one thing, a big picnic on the wide, grassy village green.

story-dragon--orange-cat--owl-complicati.transcript: Then orange cat padded up, tail drooping. Oh no, the picnic blanket blew high into the tall acorn tree and I can't reach it.

story-dragon--orange-cat--owl-resolution.transcript: Mito Al swooped down, lifted the blanket in her soft wings and laid it on the green. Friendly dragon, orange cat, and Mito Al cheered and shared warm berry buns together.

story-croissant--dragon--orange-cat-begi.transcript: In Cinnamon Acorn Village on the mossy green, friendly dragon puffed warm little smoke rings and wished someone would come play in the morning sun.

story-croissant--dragon--orange-cat-comp.transcript: Then Orange Cat trotted up the winding path, but her paws were cold and her tummy rumbled loud as a drum. I'm so hungry, she mued.

story-croissant--dragon--orange-cat-reso.transcript: Friendly dragon spotted a golden croissant tucked in the acorn roof. It sparkled and unfolded, and the two friends shared warm buttery bites giggling on the green.

story-dragon--orange-cat--rose-beginning.transcript: in Dandelion Acorn Village, friendly dragon skipped across the mossy green, wishing for a friend to play with beneath the Acorn roof cottages.

story-dragon--orange-cat--rose-complicat.transcript: Then orange cat padded up, but her red kite string had tangled tight around a wobbly fence, and she couldn't pull it free.

story-dragon--orange-cat--rose-resolutio.transcript: Nearby, a magic rose sparkled and unfolded its petals, gently loosening the knot, and the two new friends flew the kite high, laughing together.

story-dragon--magic-rock--orange-cat-beg.transcript: In Doodrop Acorn Village, a friendly dragon skipped along the mossy paths, wishing for a warm little bonfire to toast acorns on the empty green.

story-dragon--magic-rock--orange-cat-com.transcript: Just then an orange cat padded over, tail drooping. My yarn ball rolled under the fence, and I can't reach it. She mowed sadly.

story-dragon--magic-rock--orange-cat-res.transcript: Friendly dragon spotted a magic rock, which sparkled and unfolded into a tiny helping hand to fetch the yarn, then glowed warm for toasty acorns. Everyone cheered.

story-dragon--orange-cat--treasure-chest.transcript: In Firefly Acorn Village, a friendly dragon skipped down the mossy path, puffing tiny warm clouds and wishing for one game to play on the big empty green.
Then orange cat pat it over, tail curled sadly. I lost my bouncy ball in the tall grass. She mued, and the two friends began to search.
Their paws bump to treasure chest that sparkled and popped open, spilling 100 bouncy balls, and friendly dragon and orange cat played on the green till starlight.

story-dragon--golden-key--orange-cat-beg.transcript: In giggling acorn village, friendly dragons skipped along the mossy paths, wishing for one warm friend to play with on the big green.

story-dragon--golden-key--orange-cat-com.transcript: Then Orange Cat crept out from an acorn roof cottage, but the little door swung shut and clicked, locking her favorite red ball inside.

story-dragon--golden-key--orange-cat-res.transcript: Friendly dragon spotted a golden key sparkling in the moss. It clicked, the door popped open, and both friends rolled the red ball across the green, giggling.

story-dragon--magic-bag--orange-cat-begi.transcript: In Honey Acorn Village, friendly dragon puffed warm little clouds over the mossy fences and wished the empty green could be a happy place to play.

story-dragon--magic-bag--orange-cat-comp.transcript: Then orange cat trotted up, tail drooping. I want to play too. She mued, but the green is so bare and there is nothing here at all.

story-dragon--magic-bag--orange-cat-reso.transcript: Just then, a magic bag sparkled in the grass, unfolding swings, a slide, and bright balloons. Friendly dragon and orange cat cheered and played all afternoon.

story-dragon--orange-cat--wishing-star-b.transcript: In Lavender Acorn Village, a friendly dragon skipped along the mossy path, wishing someone would play tag with him on the big empty green.

story-dragon--orange-cat--wishing-star-c.transcript: Then Orange Cat popped from an acorn roof cottage, but her yarn ball had rolled up the tallest fence, far too high to reach.

story-dragon--orange-cat--wishing-star-r.transcript: Dragon huffed a warm breath and a wishing star floated up, unfolding sparkly steps that nudged the yarn down, so all three played tag till bedtime.

story-dragon--friendly-monster--white-ca.transcript: In Moonbeam A Corn Village, friendly dragon skipped down the mossy path, wishing for a game to play on the big empty green.
Then White Cat padded up with a bright red ball, but it rolled behind the tall fence where nobody could reach.
Friendly monster stretched long arms over the fence, friendly dragon flu, and white cat caught the ball. Now all three could play together, cheering and laughing.

story-dragon--owl--white-cat-beginning.transcript: On the mossy green of peppermint acorn village, friendly dragon puffed warm little smoke rings and wished for one perfect thing, a cozy campfire to toast acorn muffins.

story-dragon--owl--white-cat-complicatio.transcript: Then White Cat padded up, tail twitching. Oh no, she mured. The wind keeps puffing your fire out, and our muffins are still cold.

story-dragon--owl--white-cat-resolution.transcript: Mito Alice swooped down and spread her wide soft wings to block the wind. Friendly dragon huffed a cozy flame and all three cheered over warm, toasty muffins.

story-croissant--dragon--white-cat-begin.transcript: In puddle acorn village, friendly dragon skipped down the mossy path, warm and glowing, wishing for one small friend to share the sunny green.

story-croissant--dragon--white-cat-compl.transcript: Just then white cat crept out, shivering and cold from the shady acorn cottages, so the two friends wondered how to make her cozy and warm.

story-croissant--dragon--white-cat-resol.transcript: Friendly dragon breathed a soft puff and a buttery croissant unfolded, sparkling and toasty warm. White cat curled up on it, purring across the happy green.

story-dragon--rose--white-cat-beginning.transcript: In Rainbow Acorn Village, friendly dragon puffed warm little clouds over the green and wished for a cozy party under the Acorn roof cottages.

story-dragon--rose--white-cat-complicati.transcript: Then White Cat padded up shivering. The green is chilly and bare. She mued. Friendly dragon's tiny flames just couldn't warm the whole village.

story-dragon--rose--white-cat-resolution.transcript: By the mossy fence they found a magic rose. It sparkled and unfolded, spilling warm golden light across the green, and all three dance together cosy and giggling.

story-dragon--magic-rock--white-cat-begi.transcript: In singing Acorn Village, friendly dragon skipped along the mossy paths, wishing for one thing, a big bouncy party on the empty village green.

story-dragon--magic-rock--white-cat-comp.transcript: Then White Cat padded up tail drooping, but the green is so plain. She mued, and we have no lights and no music for a party.

story-dragon--magic-rock--white-cat-reso.transcript: Friendly dragon spotted a magic rock in the moss. It sparkled, unfolded, and spilled twinkling lanterns and jingly bells everywhere. Together they danced all night.

story-dragon--treasure-chest--white-cat-.transcript: In Star Dust Acorn Village, friendly dragon skipped along a mossy path, hoping to share warm cocoa with everyone on the wide empty village green.
Then White Cat trotted up, ears drooping. There are no cups and no chairs to sit on. She mued, friendly dragon scratched his snout.
behind a fence, white cat spotted a sparkling treasure chest. It clicked open and unfolded into cozy cups and little chairs, so everyone sipped Coco together, giggling under the stars.

story-dragon--golden-key--white-cat-begi.transcript: In Sunflower Acorn Village, a friendly dragon hummed on the mossy green, wishing everyone would come out to play under the warm morning sun.

story-dragon--golden-key--white-cat-comp.transcript: Then White Cat crept up, tail low. The village hall is locked, she mured, and the toys are all stuck inside.

story-dragon--golden-key--white-cat-reso.transcript: Dragon spotted a golden key sparkling in the grass. It clicked, the door swung wide, and everyone tumbled out to play, giggling in the sun.

story-dragon--magic-bag--white-cat-begin.transcript: On the green and tickle acorn village, a friendly dragon huffed warm little puffs. I wish to warm every cold nose today. He said with a smile.

story-dragon--magic-bag--white-cat-compl.transcript: Then White Cat padded up shivering. My mittens blew away down the mossy path. She mued, and her paws were far too cold to catch them.

story-dragon--magic-bag--white-cat-resol.transcript: Under an acorn roof, a magic bag sparkled and unfolded two soft red mittens. Dragon puffed them cozy warm, white cat wiggled her paws, and everyone cheered.

story-dragon--white-cat--wishing-star-be.transcript: In Twinkle Acorn Village, friendly dragon puffed warm little clouds over the mossy fences, wishing someone would come play on the big empty green.

story-dragon--white-cat--wishing-star-co.transcript: Soft white cat padded up, but the green was too dark now for games, and her whiskers drooped. How will we see to play? She mured.

story-dragon--white-cat--wishing-star-re.transcript: Friendly dragon spotted a wishing star nestled in the acorn roof. White cat batted it free and it unfolded, sparkling silver light, so all three danced across the glowing green.

story-dragon--friendly-monster--owl-begi.transcript: In Velvet Acorn Village, friendly dragon skipped across the mossy green, puffing tiny warm smoke rings, and wishing everyone would come play a game together.

story-dragon--friendly-monster--owl-comp.transcript: Then round friendly monster bounced up with a big soft ball, but it rolled away and got stuck high on an acorn roof.

story-dragon--friendly-monster--owl-reso.transcript: Wise metal owl swooped down, nudged the ball to friendly dragons puff of smoke, and it floated back to friendly monster. Everyone cheered and played.

story-croissant--dragon--friendly-monste.transcript: In the sunny courtyard of Amber Cloudberry Bakery, friendly dragon flapped down by the berry-shaped ovens, wishing warmly for one perfect puffy morning pastry.
Then friendly monster tiptoed over the cobbles and gasped. Oh no, the oven flame flickered out, and the dough is still cold and flat.
Dragon-breathed, a gentle golden puff, the oven glowed and a croissant sparkled and unfolded into buttery layers. Everyone shared warm crumbs, giggling under the flowery bunting.

story-dragon--friendly-monster--rose-beg.transcript: In the Blue Bell Cloudberry Bakery, friendly dragon flopped down to the cobbled courtyard, sniffing the flowery bunting. I would love to bake one warm berry bun," he said.

story-dragon--friendly-monster--rose-com.transcript: Friendly monster peeked from behind a berry-shaped oven. Oh no! She giggled. The oven is cold and I can't find a single spark to light it.

story-dragon--friendly-monster--rose-res.transcript: Then they spotted a magic rose on the windowsill. It unfolded and sparkled, and its glow woke the oven warm. Soon Dragon and Monster shared the puffyest berry bun, cheering...

story-dragon--friendly-monster--magic-ro.transcript: at Bubble Cloud Berry Berry Bakery. Friendly dragon warmed the berry-shaped ovens with tiny puffs and wish for the fluffiest Cloud Berry buns in all the woods.
Then, friendly monster tiptoe to cross the cobbles. Oh no, he whispered, my dough won't rise, and it's flat as a flowery pancake.
In the courtyard they spotted a magic rock. It sparkled, unfolded, and puffed the dough up big and round, and everyone cheered with warm, bouncy buns.

story-dragon--friendly-monster--treasure.transcript: In the Cinnamon Cloudberry Bakery, friendly dragon huffed warm puffs to light the berry ovens. Today he beamed, I will bake the tallest Cinnamon bun ever.
Then friendly monster tumbled in with the flower and gasped. Oh no, our recipe blew away in the breeze! The bunting flapped and the two friends frowned.
On the cobblers, a treasure chest sparkled and popped open, unfolding the lost recipe like a ribbon. Together, they baked the tallest, warmest bun and everyone cheered.

story-dragon--friendly-monster--golden-k.transcript: In the woodland, dandelion, cloud berry bakery, friendly dragon warmed the berry-shaped ovens with a soft puff and wished for one perfect golden loaf to share.
Friendly monster tiptoe to cross the cobbles, sniffing happily, but the oven door was stuck fast and the loaf inside stayed hidden in the dark.
Under the flowery bunting, golden key sparkled, unfolded, and clicked the door wide open. And the three friends cheered over warm, buttery bread together.

story-dragon--friendly-monster--magic-ba.transcript: In the dew drop, Cloudberry Bakery, friendly dragon warmed the berry-shaped ovens with a soft puff. Today, she smiled, I'll bake a giant Cloudberry tart.
Friendly monster hurried across the cobbles. Oh no, he said we have no flower left and the bunting is drooping.
Then friendly monster spotted a magic bag by the oven. It sparkled, unfolded, and poured out sweet flour. So all three baked the tart and cheered.

story-dragon--friendly-monster--wishing-.transcript: In the cobbled courtyard of Firefly Cloudberry Bakery, friendly dragon warmed the berry ovens with a puff of breath. Let's bake fluffy Cloudberry buns, he cheered.
Friendly monster hurried into help, but oh the flower bin was empty and the shelf sat far too high to reach.
Then friendly monster spotted a wishing star tucked in the bunting. It sparkled and unfolded into a soft flowery ladder, and together they baked warm buns for everyone.

story-croissant--dragon--owl-beginning.transcript: In the giggling Cloudberry Bakery, friendly dragon warmed the berry ovens with a soft puff and hummed, wishing for one perfect pastry to share.

story-croissant--dragon--owl-complicatio.transcript: Then metal owl swooped down to help, but the dough sat cold and flat too sleepy to rise on the flowery table.

story-croissant--dragon--owl-resolution.transcript: Dragon-breathed gentle warmth. Owl fluffed the top and a golden croissant unfolded, sparkling and puffy, so all three cheered and shared the flaky treat.

story-dragon--owl--rose-beginning.transcript: In the cobbled courtyard of Honey Cloudberry Bakery, friendly dragon warmed the berry-shaped ovens with a soft puff and wished for the perfect flower to bake his Cloudberry buns.

story-dragon--owl--rose-complication.transcript: Mido all swooped down, flapping fast. Oh no! The wind blew all the flowery bunting into a big tangle not above the ovens.

story-dragon--owl--rose-resolution.transcript: Then a magic rose sparkled on the courtyard floor and unfolded, gently lifting the bunting straight. So dragon and owl cheered and shared warm buns together.

story-dragon--magic-rock--owl-beginning.transcript: In the Woodland Bakery, friendly dragon warmed the berry ovens with a soft huff and wished for one perfect puffy cloud berry tart to share.

story-dragon--magic-rock--owl-complicati.transcript: Mito-Ala swooped down over the cobbles. Oh no, she hooded. Your oven flame is too tiny to bake the tart.

story-dragon--magic-rock--owl-resolution.transcript: Together they found a sparkly magic rock which unfolded and glowed warm and gold. The oven puffed the tart big and everyone cheered.

story-dragon--owl--treasure-chest-beginn.transcript: In the sunny courtyard of Moonbeam Cloudberry Bakery, friendly dragon warmed the berry-shaped ovens with a soft puff and wished for one perfect Cloudberry pie.

story-dragon--owl--treasure-chest-compli.transcript: Down swooped meadow owl hooting. Oh no! The flower tin is empty! The flowery bunting fluttered as the two friends wondered what to sprinkle on top.

story-dragon--owl--treasure-chest-resolu.transcript: Then they spotted a sparkling treasure chest on the cobblers. It opened and unfolded, spilling silvery sugar. Dragon dusted the pie, owl cheered and everyone tasted sweet joy.

story-dragon--golden-key--owl-beginning.transcript: In the woodland bakery, friendly dragon puffed warm breath on the berry-shaped ovens, humming as he waited for his blueberry muffins to bake golden.

story-dragon--golden-key--owl-complicati.transcript: Mito Owl swooped down onto the cobbles. The oven door is stuck tight. She hooded and the muffins could not come out.

story-dragon--golden-key--owl-resolution.transcript: Then Medo Owl spotted a golden key sparkling in the flower. It fit the little door clicked and swung open, warm muffins for everyone.

story-dragon--magic-bag--owl-beginning.transcript: In the Woodland Court yard, friendly dragon puffed warm breath on the berry ovens, humming and wishing for one perfect batch of blueberry buns.

story-dragon--magic-bag--owl-complicatio.transcript: Then metal owl swooped down, flapping worried wings, because the flowery bunting had tangled, and the buns were still too cold to bake.

story-dragon--magic-bag--owl-resolution.transcript: On the cobbles they found a magic bag that sparkled and unfolded, spilling out cozy oven mitts. Dragon puffed, owl-fand, and warm buns popped up, golden and sweet.

story-dragon--owl--wishing-star-beginnin.transcript: In the Rainbow Cloudberry Bakery, friendly dragon warmed the berry-shaped ovens with a gentle puff and wished for one perfect sky-high Cloudberry cake.

story-dragon--owl--wishing-star-complica.transcript: Mito Owl swooped down over the cobbles, hooting softly. Oh no! The oven's gone cold and our cake is still squishy in the middle.

story-dragon--owl--wishing-star-resoluti.transcript: Then Owl spotted a wishing star tucked in the bunting. It sparkled an unfolded warm golden light, baking the cake tall and sweet. Everyone cheered.

story-croissant--dragon--rose-beginning.transcript: In the singing Cloudberry Bakery, a friendly dragon landed on the cobbles, sniffed the warm ovens and wished out loud for one soft buttery treat.

story-croissant--dragon--rose-complicati.transcript: Then a golden croissant popped from a berry-shaped oven, but it was still too hot to hold, and everyone said, Ouch!

story-croissant--dragon--rose-resolution.transcript: A magic rose sparkled open, breathing cool, pedal air until the croissant was just right. And the friendly dragon shared the first happy bite.

story-croissant--dragon--magic-rock-begi.transcript: In the Star Dust Cloudberry Bakery, friendly dragon warmed the berry-shaped ovens with a soft puff and wished for one perfect buttery treat to share.

story-croissant--dragon--magic-rock-comp.transcript: Out popped a golden croissant, sparkling with sugar, but it puffed up too big and wobbled, teetering on the edge of the flowery table.

story-croissant--dragon--magic-rock-reso.transcript: Friendly dragon rolled over a smooth magic rock. It glowed and gently balanced the croissant, and everyone shared warm, flaky bites in the sunny courtyard.

story-croissant--dragon--treasure-chest-.transcript: In the sunflower, Cloudberry Bakery, a friendly dragon landed softly on the cobbles and wished with a warm little puff to bake the fluffiest breakfast ever.
He tried to warm one buttery croissant in a berry oven, but the croissant sparkled and unfolded bigger and bigger until it was too puffy to fit anywhere.
Then a treasure chest by the bunting popped open, just the right size, and the friendly dragon took the giant croissant inside, warm and golden for everyone to share.

story-croissant--dragon--golden-key-begi.transcript: In the woodland bakery, friendly dragon warmed the berry-shaped ovens with a soft puff and hummed. Today I will bake the fluffiest treat of all.

story-croissant--dragon--golden-key-comp.transcript: But the oven door stuck fast and inside a shiny croissant, sparkled and wiggled, wanting to hop out and cool on the sunny courtyard stones.

story-croissant--dragon--golden-key-reso.transcript: Then friendly dragon spotted a golden key glinting in the flower. It clicked, the door swung wide and out popped the warm croissant. Hooray!

story-croissant--dragon--magic-bag-begin.transcript: In the twinkle cloud berry bakery, friendly dragon landed softly on the cobbles and puffed a warm breath into the berry-shaped ovens. Let's bake buns for everyone. He cheered.

story-croissant--dragon--magic-bag-compl.transcript: But the last croissant on the tray sparkled, unfolded like tiny wings and floated up, up, tangling itself high in the flowery bunting.

story-croissant--dragon--magic-bag-resol.transcript: Friendly Dragon opened his magic bag and outpuffed a soft cloud ladder that lifted the croissant down. Everyone munched warm buns and giggled together.

story-croissant--dragon--wishing-star-be.transcript: In the cobbled courtyard of Velvet Cloudberry Bakery, friendly dragon fluttered down and puffed a warm breath. I would love to bake one perfect pastry today, he grinned.

story-croissant--dragon--wishing-star-co.transcript: Inside a berry-shaped oven he found one lonely croissant, but it was flat and floppy. Too soft to puff up on its own.

story-croissant--dragon--wishing-star-re.transcript: Then a wishing star drifted down, sparkling over the croissant until it curled golden and warm, friendly dragon cheered and shared it under the flowery bunting.

story-dragon--magic-rock--rose-beginning.transcript: At Amber Featherboat Harbor, friendly dragon hopped onto a lily pad dock and waved. I wished to sail a feather boat today. She said with a happy puff.

story-dragon--magic-rock--rose-complicat.transcript: But the boat sat still, with no wind to push them. Then friendly dragon spotted a magic rose, sparkling on the gui. Its petals gently unfolding.

story-dragon--magic-rock--rose-resolutio.transcript: The magic rose, breathed a soft breeze, and a glowing magic rock lifted the sails high, off-floated, friendly dragon, laughing across the shiny water.

story-dragon--rose--treasure-chest-begin.transcript: at Sunny Bluebell Featherboat Harbor, friendly dragon hopped onto a lily pad dock and puffed tiny warm sparks, wishing for a game to play.

story-dragon--rose--treasure-chest-compl.transcript: Then friendly dragon spotted a magic rose glowing on a feather boat. But the boat had drifted too far to reach across the quiet water.

story-dragon--rose--treasure-chest-resol.transcript: Friendly dragon breathes a gentle breeze. The magic rose unfolded into a bridge of petals and their sat a treasure chest full of shiny bells to ring together.

story-dragon--golden-key--rose-beginning.transcript: Morning shown on Bubble Featherboat Harbor and friendly dragon hummed on the Lily Pad dock, wishing for one sunny sail in his little feather boat.

story-dragon--golden-key--rose-complicat.transcript: But the boat was tied with a tight naughty rope. Then friendly dragon spotted a magic rose glowing pink in the painted boat house window.

story-dragon--golden-key--rose-resolutio.transcript: The magic rose unfolded to show a shiny golden key, which slipped free the knot. Off sailed friendly dragon across the key, laughing with joy.

story-dragon--magic-bag--rose-beginning.transcript: At Cinnamon Featherboat Harbor, friendly dragon hopped onto a lily pad dock, wings pink in the sunshine, wishing for one perfect flower to gift the little boats.

story-dragon--magic-bag--rose-complicati.transcript: Then a magic rose sparkled up between two feather boats, but it grew far out on the water, too far for dragons' paws to reach.

story-dragon--magic-bag--rose-resolution.transcript: Dragon opened a magic bag which unfolded a long ribbon. The ribbon looped the magic rows and pulled it close, and everyone cheered across the key.

story-dragon--rose--wishing-star-beginni.transcript: At Dandelion Featherboat Harbor, friendly dragon hummed on the Lily pad dock, wishing to sail his little feather boat out past the painted boat houses.

story-dragon--rose--wishing-star-complic.transcript: But the air was still and his feather sail hung floppy. Then he spotted a magic rose tucked in the reeds. Its petals glowing soft pink.

story-dragon--rose--wishing-star-resolut.transcript: The magic rose unfolded, and outpumped a wishing star that sparkled and blew a gentle breeze. The feather sail puffed full, and friendly dragon glided off, giggling across the quay.

story-dragon--magic-rock--treasure-chest.transcript: At Dootrop Featherboat Harbor, friendly dragon hummed on the lily pad dock, wishing for one perfect ride in the little feather-shaped boats.
But every feather boat had drifted far out on the quiet water Too far to reach until a magic rock on the shore began to glow warm and pink
Friendly dragon taps the glowing magic rock and a treasure chest spraying open, unrolling a bright ribbon that gently towed all the feather boats home for a happy ride.

story-dragon--golden-key--magic-rock-beg.transcript: At Firefly Featherboat Harbor, friendly dragon landed on a lily pad dock with a happy puff of smoke, wishing to take one little feather boat out for a sail.

story-dragon--golden-key--magic-rock-com.transcript: But every feather boat was tied with a knotted rope. Then friendly dragon spotted a magic rock on the quay, sparkling and slowly unfolding like a flower.

story-dragon--golden-key--magic-rock-res.transcript: Inside the magic rock lay a shiny golden key that untied every knot at one warm touch, and friendly dragon sailed off across the harbor giggling.

story-dragon--magic-bag--magic-rock-begi.transcript: at Giggling Featherboat Harbor, friendly dragon landed on a lily paddock and wished for one perfect ride in the softest feather boat.

story-dragon--magic-bag--magic-rock-comp.transcript: But the little feather boat had no oars, so it just spun in slow circles. Then friendly dragon spotted a shiny magic rock glowing on the key.

story-dragon--magic-bag--magic-rock-reso.transcript: The magic rock sparkled open into a magic bag full of tiny paddles, and together they scooped the water and sailed off giggling across the harbor.

story-dragon--magic-rock--wishing-star-b.transcript: At Honey Featherboat Harbor, friendly dragon hopped onto a lily pad dock and puffed warm little clouds. I want to sail a feather boat today. She cheered.

story-dragon--magic-rock--wishing-star-c.transcript: But every feather boat drifted just out of reach on the wide quay. Then dragon spotted a magic rock that sparkled and slowly unfolded into a smooth stone bridge.

story-dragon--magic-rock--wishing-star-r.transcript: Drag in tiptoe to cross and a wishing star floated up, gently nudging a boat to her paws. Together they glide it off, giggling across the shining water.

story-dragon--golden-key--treasure-chest.transcript: At Lavender Featherboat Harbor, a friendly dragon landed softly on a lily pad dock and wished for a warm cake to share with all the boats.
Then his tail bumped to treasure chest, hidden under a feather boat, and it sparkled and rattled, but its little lid stayed shut tight.
A shiny golden key floated up from the water, and together they turned it. Click the chest spring open, spilling warm cakes across the sunny key.

story-dragon--magic-bag--treasure-chest-.transcript: At Moonbeam Featherboat Harbor, a friendly dragon landed on a lily paddock with a happy puff of warm smoke. I want to give the boats a gift, he said.
Under a painted boat house he found a treasure chest, but it sparkled and popped open with too many shiny shells to carry. Oh, they keep spilling, he laughed.
Then a magic bag unfolded beside him, and the dragon scooped every shell inside. Together they hung one shiny shell on each feather boat, and the whole key glowed.

story-dragon--treasure-chest--wishing-st.transcript: at peppermint featherboat harbor, a friendly dragon puffed warm little clouds over the lily paddocks and wished for someone to sail the feather boats with.
on the key. Friendly dragon found a sparkly treasure chest, but its lid was stuck tight and would not open, no matter how gently he pushed.
A wishing star twinkled down and friendly dragon made a wish. The treasure chest clicked open, spilling glowing pearls that lit up the whole harbor with giggles.

story-dragon--golden-key--magic-bag-begi.transcript: At puddle feather boat harbor, a friendly dragon landed on a lily paddock with a happy hum. I want to take my little boat sailing today, she said.

story-dragon--golden-key--magic-bag-comp.transcript: But her feather boat was locked tight to the quay. Then something twinkled between two painted boat houses, a shiny golden key waiting to be found.

story-dragon--golden-key--magic-bag-reso.transcript: With the golden key, click the boat free, and outpopped a magic bag full of soft sales and snacks. Dragon sailed off giggling across the sparkly water.

story-dragon--golden-key--wishing-star-b.transcript: At Rainbow Featherboat Harbor, friendly dragon hopped onto a lily pad dock and puffed. Today I want to sail my little red feather boat.

story-golden-key--owl--white-cat-complic.transcript: Meadow owl fluttered down and hooded. Our picnic basket is locked tight, and I cannot find how to open it.

story-golden-key--owl--white-cat-resolut.transcript: White cat spotted a golden key sparkling in the berry bushes. It clicked and unfolded the basket, and the two friends shared berry pancakes together.

story-magic-bag--owl--white-cat-beginnin.transcript: On Rainbow Pancake Hill, White Cat hopped along the buttery stepping stones, wishing for a cozy picnic in the sunny clearing.

story-magic-bag--owl--white-cat-complica.transcript: Meadow owl swooped down and hooded, but we have no blanket and the grass is dewy and damp.

story-magic-bag--owl--white-cat-resoluti.transcript: Then white cat spotted a sparkling magic bag by the berry bushes. It opened and unfolded a soft rainbow blanket, and they picked Nick Tapley together.

story-owl--white-cat--wishing-star-begin.transcript: on Singing Pancake Hill. White cat hopped up the buttery stepping stones and wished for berries to share it a big picnic in the clearing.

story-owl--white-cat--wishing-star-compl.transcript: Then meadow owl swooped down. The berry bushes are too high for me to reach. She hooded and my basket is empty.

story-owl--white-cat--wishing-star-resol.transcript: Nearby, they found a wishing star. It sparkled and unfolded into a soft glowing ladder. So white cat and meadow owl picked sweet berries together, giggling and full.

story-croissant--rose--white-cat-beginni.transcript: On Star Dust Pancake Hill, White Cat hopped along the buttery stepping stones, wishing for a cozy picnic in the sunny clearing by the berry bushes.

story-croissant--rose--white-cat-complic.transcript: But the grass was dewy and cold. Then white cat spotted a croissant tucked in the bushes, and it unfolded wide and soft, like a warm golden blanket.

story-croissant--rose--white-cat-resolut.transcript: A magic rose sparkled and sprinkled berries onto the croissant blanket. So white cat feasted and giggled while the windmills spun. What a happy picnic.

story-croissant--magic-rock--white-cat-b.transcript: on Sunflower Pancake Hill. White cat hopped up the buttery stepping stones, whiskers twitching, wishing for one warm snack to share by the picnic clearing.

story-croissant--magic-rock--white-cat-c.transcript: Under a berry bush, white cat found a golden croissant, but it was tucked too tight to unfold and share.

story-croissant--magic-rock--white-cat-r.transcript: White cat rolled a sparkly magic rock beneath it. The rock glowed warm, the croissant unfolded flaky and wide, and everyone nibbled happily as the windmill spun.

story-croissant--treasure-chest--white-c.transcript: On Tickle Pancake Hill, White Cat hopped along the buttery stepping stones, twitching her whiskers, hoping to find something yummy for the picnic in the sunny clearing.
By a berry bush, she found a golden croissant, but it was stuck fast under a heavy stone, and white cat could not tug it free.
The warm croissant sparkled and unfolded into a springy bridge to a treasure chest, which popped open with plates and jam, and white cat cheered for the happiest picnic ever.

story-croissant--golden-key--white-cat-b.transcript: On Twinkle Pancake Hill, White Cat hopped across the buttery stepping stones, humming and hoping to share a snack with someone at the picnic clearing.

story-croissant--golden-key--white-cat-c.transcript: In a berry bush, white cat found a croissant that sparkled, but it was buttoned up tight, and nobody could smell the warm bread inside.

story-croissant--golden-key--white-cat-r.transcript: Then a golden key twinkled in the grass. White cat turned it. The croissant unfolded like a flaky flower, and everyone shared a happy hilltop feast.

story-croissant--magic-bag--white-cat-be.transcript: On Velvet Pancake Hill, White Cat hopped across the buttery stepping stones purring. What a perfect morning for a picnic in the sunny clearing.

story-croissant--magic-bag--white-cat-co.transcript: But White Cat's basket was empty and her tummy rumbled. Then, tucked in a berry bush, she found a croissant, warm and sparkling with golden crumbs.

story-croissant--magic-bag--white-cat-re.transcript: One croissant seemed too small to share, until it fluttered open a magic bag, out-tumbled berries and buns, and white cat cheered, now everyone can feast.

story-croissant--white-cat--wishing-star.transcript: at the Amber Rainbow Post Office. White cat hummed by the striped awning sorting letters into rainbow mailboxes and wishing for one special package to deliver today.
A parcel bumped open and out tumbled a warm, sparkly croissant. But the delivery track curled into a hill too steep for White Cat's little cart.
Then a wishing star drifted down, sparkling bright and lifted the card up the hill, white cat, croissant, and wishing star rolled home cheering across the sorting square.

story-magic-rock--rose--white-cat-beginn.transcript: at Bluebell Rainbow Post Office. White Cat skipped between the striped awnings, sorting letters into rainbow mailboxes and humming, wishing for one more special package to deliver.

story-magic-rock--rose--white-cat-compli.transcript: Then wind swirled through the sorting square and scattered every letter. But White Cat spotted a magic rose blooming by the tracks. It's petals sparkling and catching the fly away envelopes.

story-magic-rock--rose--white-cat-resolu.transcript: The magic rose unfolded wide, an inside sat a shining magic rock that gently pulled each letter to its right mailbox. White cat cheered, every letter home.

story-rose--treasure-chest--white-cat-be.transcript: at Bubble Rainbow Post Office. White Cat waved from the striped awning, hoping to send one happy letter down the winding rainbow track today.

story-rose--treasure-chest--white-cat-co.transcript: But her letter had no stamp. Then a magic rose sparkled open in a mailbox, unfolding petals soft and shiny as brand new stamps.

story-rose--treasure-chest--white-cat-re.transcript: White cat pressed a rose petal on her letter and a treasure chest popped open, whisking it away in a swirl of giggling bubbles.

story-golden-key--rose--white-cat-beginn.transcript: At the Cinnamon Rainbow Post Office, White Cat waved from the sorting square. I have a happy letter to send today. She purred, whiskers twitching.

story-golden-key--rose--white-cat-compli.transcript: But the rainbow mailbox was shut tight. Then white cat spotted a magic rose tucked in the awning, sparkling and slowly unfolding its soft pink petals.

story-golden-key--rose--white-cat-resolu.transcript: Inside the magic rose gleamed a tiny golden key. White cat turned it, the mailbox popped open, and the letter zoomed down the track. Hooray!

story-magic-bag--rose--white-cat-beginni.transcript: At the Dandelion Rainbow Post Office, White Cat waved her striped flag and wished for one small letter to deliver along the winding tracks today.

story-magic-bag--rose--white-cat-complic.transcript: Then White Cat found a magic rose that sparkled and unfolded a tiny map, but the wind kept flipping its soft petal pages shut.

story-magic-bag--rose--white-cat-resolut.transcript: So White Cat opened the magic bag, which puffed out a rainbow ribbon to hold the magic rose open. And off, she zoomed to deliver the mail. Hooray!

story-rose--white-cat--wishing-star-begi.transcript: At dewdrop rainbow post office, White Cat trotted along the winding track, whiskers twitching. One little letter left to deliver. She purred, hopping past the striped awnings.

story-rose--white-cat--wishing-star-comp.transcript: But the last mailbox was too high to reach. Then, in the sorting square, white cat spotted a magic rose that sparkled and slowly unfolded its petals into a soft, springy step.

story-rose--white-cat--wishing-star-reso.transcript: She hopped up the rose petal step and out popped a wishing star that lifted the letter gently into the tall mailbox. Delivered, cheered white cat, and everyone glowed with joy.

story-magic-rock--treasure-chest--white-.transcript: At the Firefly Rainbow Post Office, White Cat skipped along the winding track, whiskers twitching. One letter to deliver, she purred, for whoever lives at the end.
But the last rainbow mailbox was locked tight. In the sorting square, White Cat found a smooth magic rock that began to sparkle and hum in her paw.
The sparkling magic rock touched a mossy treasure chest, and it popped open with a golden key inside. White cat unlocked the mailbox and cheered, delivered.

story-golden-key--magic-rock--white-cat-.transcript: at the Giggling Rainbow Post Office? White cat sorted letters into rainbow mailboxes, humming happily and wishing for one special package to deliver today.
But the tallest mailbox was locked tight. White cat found a smooth magic rock on the counter, and it began to sparkle and hum.
The magic rock split open and outslid a shiny golden key. White cat turned it, the mailbox popped wide and colorful letters tumbled out. Hooray?

story-magic-bag--magic-rock--white-cat-b.transcript: At the Honey Rainbow Post Office, White Cat skipped along the winding tracks, whiskers wiggling. I want to send a hug to my friend across the woods.

story-magic-bag--magic-rock--white-cat-c.transcript: But the hug was too big and warm to hold. Then White Cat spotted a magic rock by a striped awning and it sparkled open like a tiny door.

story-magic-bag--magic-rock--white-cat-r.transcript: outfloted a magic bag. White cat scooped the warm hug inside. The magic rock glowed and the magic bag zoomed down the rainbow track giggling all the way.

story-magic-rock--white-cat--wishing-sta.transcript: At Lavender Rainbow Post Office, White Cat switched her tail by the striped awning, one tiny letter to deliver. She purred straight to the top rainbow mailbox.
but the top mailbox at 2 high to reach. Then white cat spotted a smooth magic rock in the sorting square, glowing warm and bright.
The magic rock sparkled and lifted up like a step, and a wishing star unfolded above to hold the flap open. White cat popped the letter in. To livered, she cheered.

story-golden-key--treasure-chest--white-.transcript: In the Moonbeam Rainbow Post Office, White Cat waived from her striped awning, humming as she sorted letters. Today, she purred. I'll deliver a happy surprise!
Behind the rainbow mailboxes, White Cat found a dusty treasure chest. It's sparkled and rattled, but the little lid stayed shut tight. Whatever was the surprise inside?
Then a golden key slid down the delivery track right into White Cat's paw. It turned with a click. The treasure chest spring open and out fluttered rainbow stamps for everyone.

story-magic-bag--treasure-chest--white-c.transcript: At the peppermint rainbow post office, White Cat pranced along the winding track, whiskers twitching, one shiny letter to deliver today, she purred happily.
But the letter was too big to fit any mailbox. White Cat found a sparkly treasure chest in the sorting square, so she tucked the letter safely inside.
The treasure chest was too heavy to carry until a magic bag floated down and gently scooped it up. White cat skipped off and every rainbow mailbox jingled with joy.

story-treasure-chest--white-cat--wishing.transcript: At Puddle Rainbow Post Office, White Cat sorted letters by the striped awning and wished for one very special package to deliver today.
Then White Cat found a sparkly treasure chest by the rainbow mailboxes, but its lid was stuck tight and would not open.
A little wishing star floated down, sparkled on the lock, and the treasure chest popped open, spilling shiny stamps for everyone. Hooray!

story-golden-key--magic-bag--white-cat-b.transcript: At the Rainbow Rainbow Post Office, White Cat waved from the striped awning. I have a birthday letter to mail. She purred, hugging a bright red mailbox.

story-golden-key--magic-bag--white-cat-c.transcript: But the red mailbox door was stuck fast. Then, white cat spotted a golden key, sparkling in the sorting square, right beside the winding track.

story-golden-key--magic-bag--white-cat-r.transcript: The golden key, click the door open and outfloted a magic bag that puffed up wide. White cat popped her letter inside and off it, pushed down the rainbow track.

story-golden-key--white-cat--wishing-sta.transcript: In the Singing Rainbow Post Office, White Cat hummed by the striped awning, sorting letters into rainbow mailboxes and wishing for one very special package.
but the tallest purple mailbox was locked tight. Then white cat spotted a golden key sparkling in the sorting square, though the tiny keyhole hit up too high to reach.
So White Cat waved to a wishing star who glowed down low, lifting the golden key to the lock. Click the mailbox opened and out-floated White Cat's special package.

story-magic-bag--white-cat--wishing-star.transcript: At the Stardust Rainbow Post Office, White Cat waved from the sorting square. Today I'll deliver every letter to the Rainbow Mailboxes. She purred happily.
But the striped awning fluttered and a gust scattered the letters across the winding tracks. Then white cat spotted a sparkling magic bag tucked under a bench.
The magic bag unfolded and out floated a glowing wishing star that swept every letter into the right mailbox. We did it together, cheered white cat.

story-croissant--friendly-monster--owl-b.transcript: at the Sunflower Rainbow Post Office. Friendly monster hummed by the striped awning, wishing to deliver one happy letter down the winding twisty tracks.

story-croissant--friendly-monster--owl-c.transcript: Mito Aalus swooped in hooding softly. The letter is too big for any rainbow mailbox. It simply would not fit inside.

story-croissant--friendly-monster--owl-r.transcript: Then friendly monster found a golden croissant that unfolded into a curvy slay. The letter nestled inside and owl guided it wishing home, everyone cheering.

story-friendly-monster--owl--rose-beginn.transcript: At Tickle Rainbow Post Office, friendly monster hummed by the striped awning, happily stamping tiny letters to mail to every burrow in the woods.

story-friendly-monster--owl--rose-compli.transcript: Mito Owl swooped down, Feathers ruffled, the last letter had no name, and nobody knew which rainbow mailbox it belonged in.

story-friendly-monster--owl--rose-resolu.transcript: Then friendly monster spotted a magic rose tucked inside. It unfolded and sparkled toward the red mailbox. And together they popped the letter safely home. Hooray!

story-friendly-monster--magic-rock--owl-.transcript: at the Twinkle Rainbow Post Office, friendly monsters skip between the rainbow mailboxes, humming wishing to send a birthday letter to grandma across the woods.
Then meadow owl fluttered down and hooded softly. Oh no, the letter is too big to fit through any mailbox slot.
Under the striped awning, friendly monster found a sparkling magic rock that unfolded into a wide golden slot, and the letters slid through. Woush! Everyone cheered!

story-friendly-monster--owl--treasure-ch.transcript: at the Velvet Rainbow Post Office. Friendly Monster hummed by the striped awning, wishing to send one shiny letter to every Rainbow mailbox at once.
Then Meadow Owl swooped down with a worried hoot. There is only one letter, she said, but so many little mailboxes waiting.
In the sorting square they found a sparkling treasure chest. It popped open and unfolded the letter into a whole rainbow of copies and everyone cheered as each mailbox got one.

story-friendly-monster--golden-key--owl-.transcript: On the dry patch in Amber Silver Reed Marsh, friendly monster hopped between the round islands, wishing someone would come read the tiny wooden signs with him.
Mito Owl swooped down and landed softly, but the little sign by the reeds was shut tight, and neither of them could peek inside.
Then a golden key sparkled in the silver reads. It clicked the sign open and it unfolded into a marsh map. So the two friends cheered and explored together.

story-friendly-monster--magic-bag--owl-b.transcript: In Bluebell Silver Read Marsh, a fuzzy friendly monster hopped between the round stepping islands, wishing for one perfect read to make a whistle.

story-friendly-monster--magic-bag--owl-c.transcript: Then meadow owl swooped down and said, the best reed grows across the water, but the stepping islands are too far to hop.

story-friendly-monster--magic-bag--owl-r.transcript: Friendly monster found a magic bag that sparkled and unfolded into a little bridge, so they walked across, picked the reed, and whistled together, chipping and hooting with joy.

story-friendly-monster--owl--wishing-sta.transcript: In Bubble Silver Reed, Marsh, friendly monster hopped island to island, wishing on the tall silver reeds that someone would come play in the dry sunny patch.
Down-glided meadow owl, but the little wooden signs had blown flat, so she wobbled and couldn't tell which stepping island was safe to land on.
Friendly monster found a wishing star tucked in the reeds. It sparkled and unfolded bright arrows over each island and meadow owl landed with a happy hoot to play.

story-croissant--friendly-monster--rose-.transcript: In Cinnamon Silver Reed, Marsh, friendly monster hopped island to island, waving at the little wooden signs and wishing for someone to share a snack with.
on the dry open patch. Friendly monster found a golden croissant, but it was stuck fast under a heavy silver read and would not budge.
Then a magic rose sparkled open, lifting the reeds so the croissant popped free, and friendly monster shared warm buttery bites with everyone. YUM!

story-croissant--friendly-monster--magic.transcript: In Dandelion Silver Reed Marsh, friendly monster hopped between the round islands, humming softly. I wish I could reach that little wooden sign, she said.
She spotted a golden croissant tucked in the silver reeds. It sparkled and unfolded into a curvy bridge, but its buttery middle sagged too low to cross.
Friendly monster found a smooth magic rock and slid it under the croissant, propping the bridge up firm. She skipped across to the sign cheering. We did it together.

story-croissant--friendly-monster--treas.transcript: In Do-Drop Silver-Read Marsh, friendly monster hopped island to island, humming, wishing for a warm snack to share with the little marsh frogs.
behind a tiny wooden sign, a golden croissant, sparkled and unfolded. But it was one flaky bike too big for so many hungry friends.
Then a treasure chest popped open with tiny plates, so friendly monsters shared the croissant all around and the whole marsh crunched and cheered together.

story-croissant--friendly-monster--golde.transcript: In Firefly Silver Read Marsh, friendly monster hopped between the Round Islands, waving hello to the tiny wooden signs and wishing for a nice snack to share.
Then a warm croissant popped up on a stepping island, sparkling with buttery light, but it sat too far across the water for friendly monster to reach.
A golden key floated down, sparkled and unfolded into a little bridge of reeds. So friendly monster tiptoed over and happily shared the flaky croissant with every firefly.

story-croissant--friendly-monster--magic.transcript: In the giggling silver-read marsh, friendly monster hopped between the round islands and waved. I would love a warm little snack." He said giggling.
Then a golden croissant sparkled on a wooden sign too far across the water to reach. Friendly monster stretched, but his arms were much too short.
So he opened his magic bag and out unfolded a long silver read. He hooked the sparkling croissant, munched happily, and the whole marsh giggled with him.

story-croissant--friendly-monster--wishi.transcript: On the dry patch of Honey Silver Reed Marsh, friendly monster hopped between the round islands, humming and wishing for a warm snack to share.
Then friendly monster spotted a golden croissant tucked by a tiny wooden sign, but it was much too high on a wobbly reed to reach.
So the croissant sparkled and unfolded into a soft ladder. And a wishing star drifted down to light the top, letting friendly monster climb up and share warm bites with everyone.

story-friendly-monster--magic-rock--rose.transcript: In lavender silver-read marsh, friendly monster hopped across the round stepping islands, humming and wishing for one perfect flower to smell.
Behind a tiny wooden sign, friendly monster found a magic rose, but it stayed shut tight, sparkling in the shade where no warm sun reached.
So friendly monster said a glowing magic rock beside it and its warm sparkle made the magic rose unfold. Sweet and pink. What a happy smell.

story-friendly-monster--rose--treasure-c.transcript: In Moonbeam Silver-Read Marsh, a fuzzy friendly monster hopped island to island, wishing for one soft thing to make the dry patch feel cozy and just right.
Between the silver reeds, a magic rose sparkled and unfolded its petals, but they curled up tight, hiding a little golden key nobody could reach.
Friendly Monster hummed a warm song. The magic rose opened wide, and the key clicked open a treasure chest full of soft mossy pillows for everyone to snuggle.

story-friendly-monster--golden-key--rose.transcript: In peppermint silver read marsh, friendly monster hopped island to island, waving at the tiny wooden signs. I wish someone would visit my snug little home tonight.
In the reeds, she found a magic rose that sparkled and slowly opened its petals, but inside gleamed a curled-up doorway still shut and waiting.
The unfolding magic rose lifted out a bright golden key and friendly monster twirled it in the door. Clickety click, home glowed warm, and everyone squished in for Coco.

story-friendly-monster--magic-bag--rose-.transcript: In puddle silver, Reed Marsh, friendly monster hopped island to island, humming and wished for one soft sweet smelling flower to sniff on the dry patch.
A magic rose sparkled up between two reads and unfolded its petals, but it stood far across the water. Past too many wobbly stepping islands.
Friendly Monster's magic bag popped open and unfolded a little wooden bridge. So he strolled across and sniffed the magic rose, giggling with joy.

story-friendly-monster--rose--wishing-st.transcript: In Rainbow Silver Read Marsh, a fuzzy friendly monster hopped between the round islands, humming and wishing for one bright thing to make the silver reads shine.
Then a magic rose unfolded on a stepping island, but its petals only glowed a tiny bit too soft to light the whole marsh.
So friendly monster cupped the magic rose up to a wishing star and their sparkles swirled together, filling every read with rainbow light. Hooray?

story-friendly-monster--magic-rock--trea.transcript: In singing Silver Read Marsh, a fuzzy friendly monster hopped island to island, humming with the reeds and wishing for one more friend to sing with.
Then a smooth magic rock began to sparkle by a wooden sign, but it wobbled too far to reach across the wet, wiggly water.
Friendly monsters stretched! The magic rock glowed bright, and a treasure chest unfolded into a bridge. Now they all cross together, singing loud and happy.

story-friendly-monster--golden-key--magi.transcript: On a silver island in Star Desk Silver Reed Marsh, fuzzy friendly monster hummed and waved. I want to read every little wooden sign today. She cheered.
But one small sign was locked in a box tucked under a smooth magic rock. The magic rock began to sparkle and slowly slid aside, showing a tiny keyhole.
Then a golden key twinkled in the reeds. Friendly monster turned it, the box popped open, and everyone read the happy sign. Welcome, friends.

story-friendly-monster--magic-bag--magic.transcript: In Sunflower Silver Reade Marsh, a fuzzy friendly monster hopped between the round islands, humming and wishing for one good place to sit and watch the reeds sway.
Then friendly monsters spotted a magic rock sparkling in the reeds, but it was too heavy to lift and blocked the path to the dry patch.
So friendly monster opened a soft magic bag. The magic rock floated gently inside, and together they carried it to the dry patch for a happy sit down.

story-friendly-monster--magic-rock--wish.transcript: In Tickle Silver, Reed Marsh, a fuzzy friendly monster hopped island to island. Humming, I wish I could reach that little sign across the water.
But the islands were too far apart to jump. Then friendly monsters spotted a magic rock in the reeds. It sparkled and unfolded into a wide, flat, stepping stone.
One island still felt scary, so a wishing star drifted down, sparkling a bright path. Friendly monster tipped toe to cross the magic rock, under the wishing star, and reached the sign giggling.

story-friendly-monster--golden-key--trea.transcript: On the dry patch in Twinkle Silver Read Marsh, a soft, fuzzy, friendly monster hopped between the reads, humming and wishing for one splashy game to play.
Then the friendly monster spotted a treasure chest, tucked on a stepping island, sparkling and wiggling. But its lid was shut tight and would not budge.
A little wooden sign pointed to a golden key in the reeds. The friendly monster turned it. The treasure chest popped open and out spilled bouncy bubbles for everyone. Hooray!

story-friendly-monster--magic-bag--treas.transcript: In Velvet's silver-read marsh, friendly monster hopped between the round islands, waving her furry arms. I wish I had a warm-read blanket for nap time, she said.
By a tiny wooden sign, a treasure chest sparkled and popped open, but the wind lifted its soft blankets and tumbled them all across the silver reeds.
Then a magic bag floated down, opened wide and gently caught every blanket. Friendly monster snuggled up on her island, giggling. Kozy at last! Thank you!

story-friendly-monster--treasure-chest--.transcript: Hi, in the T-Cup-shaped observatory, a fuzzy friendly monster spun the brass star maps and giggled. I wish I could find one tiny star to call my own.
On the viewing terrace, a treasure chest sat glowing, but its lid was stuck fast and the weathervane squeaked as clouds drifted over the stars.
Friendly monster and the treasure chest hugged together, popping it open, and outfloted a wishing star that lit the whole terrace twinkling just for them.

story-friendly-monster--golden-key--magi.transcript: Hi on the teacup-shaped observatory, a fuzzy friendly monster spun the weather veins and wished. I want to peak at one twinkly start tonight!
But the brass star map was locked tight. Then a golden key sparkled between two teacups. So friendly monster turned it, click, and the map swung open.
outfloted a magic bag that unfolded into a shiny telescope. Together they leaned close and found a star giggling on the breezy terrace.

story-friendly-monster--golden-key--wish.transcript: High in the teacup-shaped observatory, a friendly monster spun the weather veins and giggled, wishing it could see just one bright star tonight.
But every telescope on the terrace was locked shut. Then the monster spotted a golden key sparkling beside the brass star maps.
With the golden key, click the biggest telescope open and outpeak the warm wishing star, blinking hello and filling the whole teacup with twinkly light.

story-friendly-monster--magic-bag--wishi.transcript: Hi in the teacup-shaped observatory, a friendly monster spun the weather veins and whispered. Tonight I want to see just one bright star.
But clouds crept over the terrace, hiding the sky. Then the monster found a magic bag by the brass star map, sparkling and ready to help.
the magic bag unfolded and let a tiny wishing star float up, blowing the clouds away. Hurray cheered the friendly monster as the whole sky twinkled.

story-croissant--owl--rose-beginning.transcript: Hi on the teacup-shaped observatory. Meadow owl fluffed her wings by the brass star maps and hooded. Tonight I wish to show my friends the shiniest star of all.

story-croissant--owl--rose-complication.transcript: But clouds drifted over the terrace, hiding every star. Then metal owl spotted a golden croissant, tucked by the weathervane, glowing warm and soft.

story-croissant--owl--rose-resolution.transcript: The croissant unfolded into a bright buttery ladder, and a magic rose blossomed at its top, sweeping the clouds away, and there sparkled the shiniest star, just as meadow owl wished.

story-croissant--magic-rock--owl-beginni.transcript: Hi in the teacup-shaped observatory, Meadow Owl fluttered onto the viewing terrace and hooded softly, wishing to spot the very first evening star.

story-croissant--magic-rock--owl-complic.transcript: But the brass star maps had curled shut and there on the sill set a warm croissant that began to sparkle and slowly unfold into a golden telescope.

story-croissant--magic-rock--owl-resolut.transcript: Mito Alawl aimed the Crescent telescope, a glowing magic rock lit the map bright as day, and together they found the first star twinkling hello.

story-croissant--owl--treasure-chest-beg.transcript: High in the teacup-shaped observatory, Meadow Owl landed on the terrace with a happy hoot, wishing on the first bright star to count every twinkle tonight.

story-croissant--owl--treasure-chest-com.transcript: But the brass star map wobbled and rolled shut. Then Meadow Owl spotted a warm, buttery croissant, sparkling and curled just like the map she needed.

story-croissant--owl--treasure-chest-res.transcript: A shiny treasure chest popped open beside them, and its golden light unrolled the croissant flat into a glowing star map, so meadow owl counted every twinkle. Hooray!

story-croissant--golden-key--owl-beginni.transcript: Hi in the teacup-shaped observatory, meadow owls swooped onto the terrace and hooded. Let's find a star that giggles and spun the worrying weather veins.

story-croissant--golden-key--owl-complic.transcript: But the brass star map curled up tight like a scroll. Then Meadow Owl spotted a croissant, which sparkled warm and slowly began to unfold.

story-croissant--golden-key--owl-resolut.transcript: Inside the croissant, gleamed a golden key, which flattened the star map wide open. Meadow Owl found the giggling star, and everyone laughed under the twinkly sky.

story-croissant--magic-bag--owl-beginnin.transcript: Hi in the T-Cup-shaped Observatory, Meadow Owl spun the brass star map and hooded. Tonight, I want to show the little ones every single star.

story-croissant--magic-bag--owl-complica.transcript: But a chilly wind swept the terrace and there on the star maps had a warm golden croissant that fluttered like it wanted to fly away.

story-croissant--magic-bag--owl-resoluti.transcript: Mido Owl tucked the sparkling croissant into a glowing magic bag which puffed open into a snug tent and everyone watched the stars, cozy and giggling.

story-croissant--owl--wishing-star-begin.transcript: Hi on the hilltop in the lavender teacup observatory. Meadow Owl fluttered onto the terrace and hooded. Tonight I wish to find the very first star.

story-croissant--owl--wishing-star-compl.transcript: But the brass star maps drooped and the weathervane spun the wrong way. Then Meadow Owl found a warm buttery croissant that sparkled and unfolded into a bright curling arrow.

story-croissant--owl--wishing-star-resol.transcript: The croissants' arrow pointed up, and their wishing star opened its silvery light. Meadow Owl cheered as the whole teacup observatory glowed. First star found.
